//: CHOS-407: Lighthouse CI performance budgets. Run by .github/workflows/lighthouse.yml. Targets the PUBLIC pages (no backend/auth needed) so the gate is hermetic — the Next server is started on its own. INP is a field-only metric (not available in a Lighthouse lab run); Total Blocking Time is its lab proxy, so the INP<200ms budget is enforced via total-blocking-time. Thresholds may need first-run tuning on the CI runner (same as the CHOS-404 a11y gate).
